case_title: LIM, KENNETH et al vs. CONTRERAS, EDWIN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, EDWIN CONTRERAS, DOLLY M. SUED AS CONTRERAS, MARIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 14 FREDSON COURT, S.F. $2,020.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,020.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED TILL SEPT 7, 1997 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS.DFTS TO PAY RENT IN INSTALL OF $100- PER MONTH STARTING 10/1/97. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL WVR OF ALL CLAIMS. FAILURE TO COMPLY PLTF TO RECOVER ALL DAMAGES, ATTY FEES AND COSTS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, DOLLY M. SUED AS CONTRERAS, MARIA

LITTMAN, ATTY FOR PLFT. ALSO PRESENT WAS DEFENDANT MARIA CONTRERAS IN PRO PER. PARTIES ABSENT INCLUDED DOROTHY LIM, PLTF. AND EDWIN CONTRERAS, DEFT. 2:40 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS.
